description: Lightweight Vue 3 state management with dependency injection, inspired by Angular services. Replace Vuex/Pinia via class-based services and component-level DI for reactive state sharing.
rules: Use class-based services with dependency injection instead of centralized stores like Pinia/Vuex
Three scope levels available: component-level (useService), global root (useRootService), app-level (useAppService)
Mark service classes with @Injectable() decorator to make them injectable via DI container
Use declareProviders() in component setup to bind services to component scope — service lifecycle then matches the component's
Retrieve reactive service instances via useService(), useRootService(), or useAppService() composables
This library re-exports all @kaokei/di APIs — use @kaokei/di for advanced DI patterns like tokens and bindings
Services support lifecycle via constructor (acts as post-construct initialization)
